roa.docketEntryComment: Def Motion to Add to Calendar to Recall Bench Warrant issued 2-3-23 for failure to appear for Trial
Order of the Court Finding Good Cause  to Continue due to  Public Health RE COVID-19 Pandemic
Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Warrant - Bench Warrant Return 081722 FTA JURY TRIAL
DEFT'S MOTION MODIFICATION OF RELEASE CONDITIONS FILED
DEFT'S MOTION TO RELEASE ON HIS OWN RECOGNIZANCE FILED
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/X:ANGELA FISHER AND ALEXANDRIA CARL APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/CTORD:ELECTRONIC MONITORING TERMINATED,/X:TRIAL DATE CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:DEFENSE BAIL MOTION/MO GRTD/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,//WS/WEAP/CTORD:DEFENDANT ABIDE BY PREVIOUSLY ISSUED CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:TRIAL DATE OF 10-15-21 IS CONFIRMED,/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN (FTA 07-16-21 TRIAL, 1ST BW)/DAWT/BWDNC/SHER/BAIL:80000/NTW/LD: 10-29-21/CONTD: DEFENSE BAIL MOTION ON 09-09-21/CONTD: TRIAL ON 10-15-21/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:ALEXANDRIA CARL/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 01-04-21/987,2/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND TRIAL/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE DEFENDANT WAIVES THE RIGHT TO A PRELIMINARYHEARING & IS ADVISED AS TO THE RIGHTS HE IS WAIVING,  COUNSEL CONCURS WITHHIS WISH TO WAIVE THE HEARING/HTA1:1, 2 & 3/NB/DEFTCUST3/

/CAL: ARRIANGMENT/X: DEFENDANT APPEARS VIA ZOOM/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S)& DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 11-05-20/X: TIME ESTIMATE 90 MINUTES/NB/SA1: TRACY CASAYURAN AND KEVIN CASAYURAN/SA2: 2425 33RD AVE, SF AND 1600 BLOCK OF ARMSTRONG AVE, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 10-07-20/DOP/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 10-21-20/DOP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/X:THE PEOPLE FILE A MOTION TO DETAIN/NP/X:THE DEFENDANTDIDN'T MAKE THE SAN BRUNO BUS/NB/CONTD:I&A, P&C/DOP/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL, LD 10-19-21 (COV19)/DAWT/X:PEOPLE READY, DEFENSE READY BUT UNAVAILABLE/CAUSE/CONT/
